Formerly.text: PP Sauber AG Red Bull Sauber AG BMW Sauber AG [ 1 ]

Fate.text: Acquired by Audi in 2024, subsequently became Audi's factory team in Formula One from 2026 onwards

Key people.text: Gernot Döllner (Chairman) Mattia Binotto (CEO) Jonathan Wheatley (Team Principal)

infoboxes.title: Subaru as a Formula One engine manufacturer

rows.Technology Changes & Notes: Hitachi manufactured Front-facing stereoscopic greyscale cameras (x2)

rows.Lane Departure Systems: Warns during lane sway or departure
rows.Pre-collision Braking: 30 km/h (19 mph) maximum speed differential for braking

rows.Technology Changes & Notes: Front-facing cameras updated, now color Lower profile in vehicle for improved stray light rejection Adds rear radar option
rows.Adaptive Cruise: Adds "Lane Keeping Assist" to gently steer inside lanes if speed is above 65 km/h (40 mph)
rows.Lane Departure Systems: Applies torque to center the vehicle if unsignaled lane change occurs
rows.Pre-collision Braking: Improved speed differential for braking if speed is under 50 km/h (31 mph) New cameras increase range and viewing angle by ~40% Throttle management added for reversing
rows.Rear Radar Features: Adds rear cross traffic alerts, blind spot detection, and lane change warnings.

rows.Technology Changes & Notes: New camera system from Veoneer, core CPU from Xilinx Camera body has integrated heater and cooling fans, lens housing now flush to windshield. Optional third front-facing wide-range mono camera (some models)
rows.Adaptive Cruise: Wider angle camera for smoother cruise around sharp curves
rows.Pre-collision Braking: Adds Automatic Emergency Steering, if speed is under 80 km/h (50 mph) Adds electronic brake booster Optional wide-angle camera improves pedestrian and bike detection
rows.Rear Radar Features: If included, enables Automatic Emergency Steering for collision prevention

rows.Launch Date: No North America Release (2020 Japan / Europe-only on Levorg)
rows.Technology Changes & Notes: Based on Gen 4 Platform Adds front-facing 77 GHz MW wave radar Adds front corner radars
AMD Versal AI Edge Series (Gen 2) SOC, onsemi Hyperlux AR0823AT Sensors

Fate.text: Merged with Packard to form the Studebaker-Packard Corporation Merged with Wagner Electric and Worthington Corporation to form Studebaker-Worthington Some naming and production rights, along with Studebaker's South Bend plant, acquired by the Avanti Motor Company
